arts.ttl: Real Madrid CONFIRM Trent Alexander-Arnold plan
arts.sum: Real Madrid have reportedly informed Liverpool of their plan to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold on a free transfer next summer. Although Real Madrid have stated their desire to sign Alexander-Arnold, former Liverpool defender Jamie Carragher believes the England international will choose to extend his contract at Anfield rather than secure a move to Spain.

arts.ttl: Minor who racially abused Vinicius banned, say Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid say a minor who racially abused the club's forward Vinicius Junior has been given a one-year stadium ban and also been fined.

arts.ttl: ‘A great honour’ – Real Madrid send anniversary message to Barcelona
arts.sum: Real Madrid have on Friday moved to reveal their appreciation for the club’s arch rivals, Barcelona. This, of course, comes on a special day for all associated with the Blaugrana.…

arts.ttl: 'Mbappe looks SCARED and SHY' says Real Madrid legend
arts.sum: Guti, who made 542 appearances and won 15 trophies at Real Madrid, continued: “Mbappe has now come to another team where he will surely have to compete with great players to be the best, and all that costs. Real Madrid legend Guti believes that Kylian Mbappe is lacking confidence amid his current woes at the Santiago Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham issues apology to Real Madrid fans after Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham apologises to Real Madrid fans after the defeat to Liverpool in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Rodrygo Goes closing in on Real Madrid return against Getafe
arts.sum: Real Madrid finally have some positive injury news ahead of facing Getafe on December 1. Los Blancos host their local rivals in the Spanish capital, in La Liga action, as they aim to bounce back from a midweek UEFA Champions League loss at Liverpool.
